com.nib.supernaut.values.StartCode

Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.ati
Automatic Transaction Initiation (ATI) support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.observability
Observability and monitoring interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.
